pr.title: Split out OS and OSAlarm, fix several SDK splits, begin labeling SDK functions
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Large SDK organization and symbol-labeling PR. It split Dolphin SDK assembly out of broad/incorrect containers, notably adding asm/dolphin/os/OS.s and asm/dolphin/os/OSAlarm.s and adding MTX-related split files, then updated obj_files.mk to build the new objects. It also began replacing anonymous func_/lbl_ symbols with official-looking Dolphin SDK names across assembly, bss/data, and function/variable declaration headers, including OS interrupt APIs, AI APIs, AR/ARQ globals, DVD/OS globals, and JPEG Huffman table names. The PR had no body or review comments in the slice, so intent beyond the title and diff is inferred from changed files and symbol renames.

key_files.why: New 630-line split-out OS assembly file; contains renamed OS routines such as __OSSetInterruptHandler and central OS initialization code.
New 515-line split-out OSAlarm assembly file, moving alarm-related SDK code into its own subsystem file.
Large deletion-heavy file, consistent with moving SDK code out of a monolithic catch-all into more precise subsystem files.
New 630-line MTX split file added as part of fixing SDK splits.
New MTX44 split file added to separate matrix-related SDK code.
New vector split file added while asm/dolphin/mtx/mtxvec.s lost most of its previous contents.
Heavily relabeled AI SDK file; func_ symbols became AIInitDMA, AIStartDMA, AISetStreamPlayState, AIGetStreamSampleRate, AISetStreamVolLeft, AIGetStreamVolRight, AIInit, and related names.

BSS labels were renamed from anonymous lbl_ addresses to SDK/global names such as BootInfo, BI2DebugFlag, AreWeInitialized, OSExceptionTable, AlarmQueue, __PADSpec, __AIS_Callback, __AID_Callback, __AR_* and __ARQ_* globals.
Data label lbl_80401618 was renamed to DriveInfo for the Dolphin OS revision/banner string.
Function declarations were updated to reflect newly labeled SDK function names.
Variable declarations were updated to match renamed data/BSS symbols.
Build list gained the new split objects, including asm/dolphin/mtx/mtx.o, mtx44.o, vec.o, asm/dolphin/os/OS.o, and OSAlarm.o.
Map output name changed from ssbm.map to GALE01.map.

what_changed: Split Dolphin OS code into a new asm/dolphin/os/OS.s file.
Split Dolphin OS alarm code into a new asm/dolphin/os/OSAlarm.s file.
Moved substantial content out of asm/dolphin/dolphin_sdk_1.s, which lost 1253 lines and gained only 124 lines.
Added MTX split files asm/dolphin/mtx/mtx.s, asm/dolphin/mtx/mtx44.s, and asm/dolphin/mtx/vec.s, while asm/dolphin/mtx/mtxvec.s was reduced heavily.
Updated obj_files.mk so the new split assembly files are built in the project object list.
Relabeled many assembly call targets from anonymous func_ names to SDK names, for example func_803473B0 to __OSSetInterruptHandler and func_803477B4 to __OSUnmaskInterrupts.

Relabeled AI SDK functions in asm/dolphin/ai/ai.s, including AIInitDMA, AIStartDMA, AISetStreamPlayState, AIGetStreamPlayState, AISetDSPSampleRate, AIGetDSPSampleRate, AISetStreamSampleRate, AIGetStreamSampleRate, AISetStreamVolLeft, AIGetStreamVolLeft, AISetStreamVolRight, AIGetStreamVolRight, AIInit, and __AI_SRC_INIT callsites.

Renamed SDK/global BSS symbols from lbl_ addresses to meaningful names such as BootInfo, BI2DebugFlag, BI2DebugFlagHolder, AreWeInitialized, OSExceptionTable, AlarmQueue, __PADSpec, __AIS_Callback, __AID_Callback, __AI_init_flag, __AR_Callback, __AR_Size, __AR_StackPointer, __AR_FreeBlocks, __AR_BlockLength, __AR_init_flag, and ARQ queue/callback globals.
Renamed JPEG-related BSS symbols to Ydchuff, Udchuff, Vdchuff, Yachuff, Uachuff, and Vachuff.
Renamed the Dolphin OS data string label to DriveInfo.
Propagated new symbol names into references across many asm/melee and asm/sysdolphin files, plus include/functions.h and include/variables.h.
Changed the generated map file name from ssbm.map to GALE01.map.
smart_moves: The PR treated SDK splitting and symbol labeling as connected work: after moving OS/OSAlarm/MTX code into more accurate files, it updated build ordering and references so labels stayed consistent.

Renaming callsites across the tree made each official SDK identification immediately useful outside the defining file; for example __OSSetInterruptHandler replaced anonymous calls in DebuggerDriver, AI, AR, DVD, GX, and other SDK assembly.
BSS/data symbol labels were updated at the storage definitions and at users, avoiding a mismatch between meaningful function names and still-anonymous globals.
New files preserve address/comment style in assembly, keeping split code searchable by original address while improving subsystem organization.
Using official-style Dolphin SDK names for AI/OS/AR symbols creates reusable anchors for later C decompilation and header typing work.
decomp_lessons: When splitting monolithic SDK assembly, update obj_files.mk in the same change so object order and linker coverage remain explicit.
Function renames should be propagated through all assembly callsites and declarations immediately; this improves future matching work and avoids stale func_ aliases.
BSS and data renames matter as much as text labels for SDK decompilation because many SDK routines are recognizable through globals such as callback pointers, init flags, queues, and hardware state.
Official SDK naming can clarify behavior before C conversion: names like AISetStreamVolLeft or __OSSetInterruptHandler encode register/bit manipulation intent without changing instructions.
Renaming a broad lbl_ symbol to a named global should preserve exact storage size and placement; this PR's excerpt shows labels changed while .skip sizes stayed the same.
A good split PR can be mostly structural and still high-value: moving code out of dolphin_sdk_1.s and labeling known SDK pieces makes later source-file reconstruction easier.
naming_conventions: Use official Dolphin SDK exported names with subsystem prefixes, such as AIInitDMA, AIStartDMA, AISetStreamPlayState, AIGetDSPSampleRate, OSDisableInterrupts, and OSRestoreInterrupts.

Use double-underscore internal SDK names for private/internal routines and globals, such as __OSSetInterruptHandler, __OSUnmaskInterrupts, __AI_SRC_INIT, __AI_init_flag, __AR_Callback, and __ARQRequestQueueHi.
Use subsystem-specific callback/global names instead of address labels, for example __AIS_Callback and __AID_Callback for AI callback storage.
Use known OS global names such as BootInfo, BI2DebugFlag, BI2DebugFlagHolder, AreWeInitialized, OSExceptionTable, AlarmQueue, DriveInfo, and __DVDLongFileNameFlag.
Use SDK/library table names when identifiable, such as Ydchuff, Udchuff, Vdchuff, Yachuff, Uachuff, and Vachuff for JPEG Huffman-related BSS buffers.
Split-file paths follow Dolphin subsystem casing already present in the repo: asm/dolphin/os/OS.s, asm/dolphin/os/OSAlarm.s, asm/dolphin/mtx/mtx.s, asm/dolphin/mtx/mtx44.s, and asm/dolphin/mtx/vec.s.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Performed label-only assembly rewrites where instruction bytes and addresses remained unchanged, replacing anonymous labels with meaningful symbols while preserving matching.
Moved contiguous SDK assembly into new files without evidence of changing instructions, relying on object-list updates for layout preservation.
Kept original disassembly address comments alongside relabeled functions, maintaining address-based traceability after renames.
Changed .section .text comments in split files to reflect narrower address ranges, as seen in asm/dolphin/ai/ai.s moving from a broad text range comment to 0x803503E4-0x80350C88.
Used known call graph behavior to propagate labels: once func_803473B0 became __OSSetInterruptHandler, many branch-and-link callsites across SDK files were renamed.
Preserved BSS allocation sizes while renaming globals, which is safe for matching and improves semantic readability.

review_feedback.note: No PR body, issue comments, reviews, or review comments were present in the provided PR slice.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that convert asm/dolphin/os/OS.s or OSAlarm.s to C.
Search for uses of __OSSetInterruptHandler to see when OS interrupt APIs received typed prototypes.
Check subsequent PRs for more Dolphin SDK official-name propagation in include/functions.h and include/variables.h.
Compare obj_files.mk ordering around the new OS/MTX split files against later linker-order fixes.
Look for follow-up work replacing AI assembly labels with C implementations.
